title: Andrew Gordon (naval historian)
body: Gilbert Andrew Hugh Gordon  (born 23 July 1951) is a British academic maritime war historian, who wrote the First World War history The Rules of the Game (Jutland & the British Naval Command) (1996).
categories: BLP articles lacking sources from June 2018
